note: Declare which model families you actually have before the first run. Availability booleans only, never key values. The lead seats every roster from this file, not from memory. Re-generate or edit it when you add a key or a seat fails. Family names are yours to choose; the loop only cares that critic families differ from the builder's.

family-a.invoke: the assistant session you are already in

family-b.invoke: a CLI coding agent you are signed into (e.g. codex exec)

seat_rules.lead: your flat-rate resident model; keep metered premium models out of this accumulating seat
seat_rules.drafters: cheapest capable families, split the variant count across two families when you have them
seat_rules.cross_family_critic: any available family that is NOT the builder's; substitute another family or report unverified if it is down
seat_rules.fresh_eyes: a second lens; fine on the lead's family, never the only critic
seat_rules.escalation_consult: OPTIONAL. Leave empty if you have no premium model or do not want one in the loop: an empty seat means a stalemate is reported honestly instead of escalated. It never blocks a run.
